programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Peyton Manning opens up the season with a seven touchdown performance against the reigning Super Bowl Champion Ravens in a 49-27 Broncos' statement victory.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Relive the Week 8, 2016 matchup between the Oakland Raiders and the Tampa Bay Buccaneers where quarterback Derek Carr finished with a franchise-record 513 yards passing, completing 40 of 59 passes without an interception.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Drew Brees throws for 505 yards and seven touchdowns as Kai Forbath kicks a 50-yard field goal to secure a 52-49 Saints victory; the teams set an NFL record with 13 combined touchdown passes.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Stepping up in mop-up duty, backup quarterback Matt Flynn capped his 480-yard and six-touchdown performance with a go-ahead touchdown pass to Jermichael Finley with 1:10 left to give the Packers a 45-41 road win over the Detroit Lions.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Jay Cutler threw three TD passes to Brandon Marshall just for good measure, and the Bears put up their highest points total since 1980, routing the Tennessee Titans 51-20 on Sunday for their sixth straight win.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Rookie Odell Beckham Jr. caught three touchdown passes and came within one reception of tying the team's single-game record against the Redskins during Week 15 of the 2014 season.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Rob Bironas kicked a 26-yard field goal in overtime, and the Titans stopped backup quarterback Shaun Hill on fourth down to finally pull out a 44-41 win over the Detroit Lions.

programme.title: Playing Lessons

programme.sub-title: Build a Better Game: Head to Toe With Martin Hall
programme.desc: The feet are pivotal in the swing for balance and proper weight shift; Martin explains how the feet should sequence during the swing and offers drills for proper movement and balance.

programme.title: Golfer's Guide - Swing Sequencing
programme.desc: Nathalie Sheehan is helping you add distance and hit more fairways with the driver by improving your sequence. Start at address, take the club back to the top, bring it down through impact and into the finish learning the biggest keys and drills.

programme.title: Golfer's Guide - Swing Sequencing
programme.desc: Nathalie Sheehan is helping you hit more greens and make more powerful contact with the irons by improving your sequence. Start at address, take the club back to the top, bring it down through impact and into the finish.

programme.title: Me and My Golf
programme.desc: Andy Proudman and Piers Ward explain how to dial in distances with short irons and how to hit them on line every time; they also explain the bounce angle and how to choose the right amount.

programme.desc: A businessman embarks on a revenge-fueled vendetta after his daughter dies in a terrorist bombing. His search leads to a cat-and-mouse conflict with a British government official whose past may hold the clues to the identities of the elusive killers.

programme.title: The Forbidden Kingdom
programme.desc: A discovery made by a kung fu obsessed American teen sends him on an adventure to China, where he joins up with a band of martial arts warriors in order to free the imprisoned Monkey King.

programme.title: Ip Man
programme.desc: The life story of Yip Man, the first person to teach the Chinese martial art of Wing Chun.

programme.title: Ip Man 2: Legend of the Grandmaster
programme.desc: Wing Chun martial arts master Ip Man moves to Hong Kong to create a school where he can teach his fighting techniques to a new generation. Instead, he's drawn into a showdown with a merciless boxer known as the Twister.

programme.title: Ip Man 3
programme.desc: Martial-arts master Ip Man takes on a crooked developer and his gang of brutal thugs.

programme.title: Ip Man 4: The Finale
programme.desc: Ip Man and his son encounter racial discrimination after traveling to the United States to seek a better life.

programme.title: Master Z: Ip Man Legacy
programme.desc: Defeated by Master Ip, martial arts expert Cheung Tin Chi tries to lead a normal life in Hong Kong until triad leaders draw him back into fighting.

programme.title: From Dusk Till Dawn
programme.desc: Three months after freeing Santanico from the Titty Twister, the Gecko Brothers are still on the run; Seth and Kate are lost in Mexico; Richie and Santanico plot vengeance on the culebra Lord.

programme.title: From Dusk Till Dawn
programme.desc: Seth and Kate pull off a heist; Ranger Gonzalez confronts nightmarish visions; Carlos's emergence from the Labyrinth.

programme.desc: Richie and Santanico pose as sex traffickers to infiltrate Malvado's food supply, while Sonja forces Seth to kick his drug habit. Meanwhile, Freddie faces off with Sex Machine.

programme.title: BloodRayne 2: Deliverance

programme.title: The Forger
